hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE "(^|/)sdkconfig$"; then echo "BLOCK: Edit sdkconfig.defaults instead — sdkconfig is auto-generated by idf.py menuconfig."; exit 1; fi'
bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q "managed_components/"; then echo "BLOCK: managed_components/ is auto-generated by ESP-IDF component manager."; exit 1; fi'
